result: Agent request asks for GitHub, Slack, and Jira access.
Read paths and write paths are separated before any approval posture is set.
GitHub, Slack, and Jira get scoped dry-run allowances plus blocked write actions.
Customer incident context and support escalations are treated as sensitive until policy proof exists.
Production access, compliance readiness, and write-action claims remain blocked.
Security/Legal, Engineering, Support Ops, and conditional Finance owners are named.
Each reviewer owner receives the proof task that blocks access from moving forward.
A scoped dry-run pilot review is the next step, not production access.
